title: Dispatch
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module explains the dispatch process in stainless steel manufacturing, including order verification, packaging, loading, documentation, transportation, and delivery to customers.
learningObjectives: Learn how finished products are prepared for shipment.
Identify the documents required for dispatch.
Recognize quality and safety practices during dispatch.

content.introduction: Dispatch is the final stage of the manufacturing process where finished products are verified, packed, documented, loaded, and transported to customers. Efficient dispatch operations ensure timely delivery and customer satisfaction.
content.purpose: The primary objective of dispatch is to deliver the correct product, in the correct quantity and condition, to the customer while maintaining complete documentation and traceability.
safetyPrecautions: Do not exceed vehicle load limits.
Ensure safe loading and unloading practices.
content.summary: Dispatch is the final link between manufacturing and the customer. Proper planning, documentation, packaging, quality verification, and safe transportation ensure products reach customers accurately and on time.
